cedict_en: for the most part/many/most/the greater part/mostly

must_distinguish.note: 大都 is a manner adverb (generally, for the most part — literary/formal); 大多 is a quantifier-adverb (most of — focuses on proportion of a set, more colloquial)

大多数 = the majority (more than half, counting individual items or people — used with countables); 大部分 = most of / a large portion (emphasises share or fraction of a whole — used with mass or abstract quantities too).

cedict_en: (coll.) large bus/coach/(abbr. for 大型巴士)

must_distinguish.note: 公交车 = city transit bus (urban public transport system); 大巴 = coach/large bus (intercity or hired, not a scheduled city line)

cedict_en: arrogant idler/self-centered show-off/(coll.) father's older brother/uncle/term of respect for older man
dataset_meanings: term of respect for older man

must_distinguish.note: 大爷 = polite address to an older man / paternal uncle (father's elder brother); 叔叔 = uncle (father's younger brother, also polite address to middle-aged man); 舅舅 = uncle (mother's brother)
Both mean 'outline/synopsis': 大纲 is an official or curricular syllabus (broader scope); 提纲 is a working outline or notes-skeleton for a speech/essay (personal use)

大胆 = bold/daring (neutral to mildly pejorative — can imply recklessness); 勇于 = have the courage to do X (positive, always tied to a specific admirable action); 豪迈 = bold-spirited/heroic (literary, broad character trait)
All cluster around 'large' but differ: 大规模 = large in scope/scale (of operations or projects); 大型 = large in physical size or category; 大量 = large in quantity/amount.

cedict_en: Dadu, capital of China during the Yuan Dynasty (1280-1368), modern day Beijing/for the most part/on the whole/also pr. [da4 du1]/metropolitan
dataset_meanings: Dadu, capital of China during the Yuan Dynasty (1280-1368), modern day Beijing

must_distinguish.note: 大都 is a manner adverb (generally, for the most part — literary/formal); 大多 is a quantifier-adverb (most of — focuses on proportion of a set, more colloquial)

meaning_en: in the sky; in the heavens

must_distinguish.note: All involve sky/air. 空中 = mid-air/airspace (where planes fly); 天上 = up in the sky/heavens (celestial, poetic); 天空 = the sky as a visual expanse (noun); 太空 = outer space (beyond atmosphere).
夫妻 = everyday word for a couple (husband and wife, informal/neutral); 夫妇 = slightly more formal/written register

cedict_en: erhua form of 女孩[nu : 3 hai2]

must_distinguish.note: 女孩/女孩儿 = girl any age (neutral); 女生 = female student/schoolgirl context; 少女 = teenage/maiden (literary); 姑娘 = warm colloquial young woman; 女朋友 = romantic girlfriend only
女孩/女孩儿 = girl any age (neutral); 女生 = female student/schoolgirl context; 少女 = teenage/maiden (literary); 姑娘 = warm colloquial young woman; 女朋友 = romantic girlfriend only

cedict_en: close friend/pal/(social networking website) friend/CL:個|个[ge4]

must_distinguish.note: 好友 = close personal friend (emotional intimacy, non-family); 亲人 = close relatives/loved ones (family bond); 伙伴 = companion/partner (cooperative relationship, not necessarily intimate)
好多 = colloquial 'a lot'; 许多 = neutral written 'many'; 不少 = litotes 'quite a few' (understatement); 众多 = formal 'numerous' (large collectives)

cedict_en: erhua variant of 好玩[hao3 wan2]

must_distinguish.note: 好玩儿 = fun/amusing (colloquial, about an activity); 有趣 = interesting/amusing (neutral adj); 乐趣 = joy/delight (noun, inner feeling); 趣味 = personal taste/liking or charm (noun); 娱乐 = entertainment/leisure (noun/verb, broader)

cedict_en: good-looking; nice-looking/(of a movie, book, TV show etc) good/in an embarrassing situation
dataset_meanings: good (of a movie, book, TV show etc)

must_distinguish.note: 好看 = good-looking / nice (general, any gender, also means 'enjoyable to watch'); 英俊 = handsome (specifically of men, more literary/formal)

好看 = good-looking (anything: people, objects, scenery); 帅 = handsome/cool (adjective, colloquial praise); 帅哥 = handsome guy (vocative address term, colloquial); 英俊 = handsome (formal adjective, men only)
运气 = luck (good or bad, neutral); 好运 = good luck (simply positive); 福 = blessing/fortune (cultural, ceremonial); 福气 = blessed lot/good fortune (earned or destined, warm)
All express comparison 'like/as'; 像 is the common verb 'to resemble'; 如同 and 犹如 are more literary equivalents used in written or formal comparisons, with 犹如 slightly more poetic.
妹 = morpheme used in compounds (姐妹, 妹夫); 妹妹 = standalone colloquial word for younger sister
老婆 (5k) = wife (casual/intimate); 妻子 = wife (standard/neutral written); 太太 (5k) = Mrs./wife (polite, slightly formal); 夫人 (5k) = wife (honorific, used for dignitaries or respectfully of others).
Same meaning; 姐 is the short bound form used in compounds (e.g. 大姐) or addressing; 姐姐 is the freestanding spoken form for 'older sister'
子女 = sons and daughters (neutral formal, legal/statistical contexts); 儿女 = sons and daughters (slightly more literary/emotional register)

cedict_en: letter/symbol/character/word/CL:個|个[ge4]/courtesy or style name traditionally given to males aged 20 in dynastic China
dataset_meanings: courtesy or style name traditionally given to males aged 20 in dynastic China

must_distinguish.note: 字 = single character/letter (unit of script); 汉字 = Chinese character specifically; 词 = word as a lexical unit (may be multi-character); 文字 = writing system/script (collective, abstract)

cedict_en: to deposit money (in a bank etc)/bank savings/bank deposit
dataset_meanings: to deposit money (in a bank etc)

must_distinguish.note: 存款 = bank savings/deposit (noun); 存 = verb to deposit or store; 押金 = refundable security deposit, not savings

cedict_en: surname Ji/season/the last month of a season/fourth or youngest amongst brothers/classifier for seasonal crop yields
dataset_meanings: the last month of a season

must_distinguish.note: 季 = season as a morpheme (in compounds: 季度, 四季); 季节 = standalone word for season; 淡季 = off-season (commerce/tourism)
学科 = academic discipline or field of study (broad: linguistics, biology); 科目 = specific subject item on a curriculum or examination list (narrower, administrative).
孩子 = child/kid (neutral everyday); 小朋友 = child/little friend (warm, adult addressing a child); 儿童 = children (formal/official, e.g. 儿童节); 小孩 = kid (colloquial, slightly diminutive)

宁静 = serene (of environment/atmosphere, poetic); 安宁 = peaceful tranquility (freedom from disturbance); 平静 = calm (of a state or mood, neutral); 镇静 = composure, calm oneself down (after agitation); 沉着 = cool-headed under pressure (personality, action context)

宝 = treasure (noun, also term of endearment); 宝贵 = valuable (experience, time, opportunities — abstract); 珍贵 = precious (rare objects, keepsakes, memories); 珍稀 = rare and scarce (species, resources — emphasises rarity)
宝石 = gemstone (physical object); 宝贵 = valuable/precious (abstract: time, experience); 珍贵 = precious/rare (of objects or moments); 珍稀 = rare and precious (emphasis on scarcity, of species/resources)

cedict_en: to do harm to/to cause trouble to/harm/evil/calamity

must_distinguish.note: 害 = harm (basic, colloquial, can also be noun); 伤害 = hurt/injure (personal, bodily or emotional); 损害 = damage/harm (formal, abstract — interests, health, reputation); 损坏 = damage (physical objects); 危害 = endanger (serious systemic threat); 破坏 = destroy/sabotage (deliberate structural damage)
害 is the general root (harm as verb/noun); 危害 stresses endangering/threatening (health, society); 伤害 means physically or emotionally hurt (a person).

宽 (5k) = wide in physical dimension (宽两米); 广 = broad/extensive (often figurative or as morpheme); 宽广 = wide and spacious (combined adj., formal); 广阔 (5k) = vast expanse of space or prospects (literary).

cedict_en: surname Mi/name of an ancient state/dense; close; thick/intimate; close/(bound form) secret; confidential/(Internet slang) to send a private message to (sb); to DM

must_distinguish.note: 密 adj = dense OR covert; 秘密 = secret (noun/adj, purely about secrecy); 保密 = the act of keeping something secret
寒冷 = cold/frigid (general descriptive adj); 严寒 = bitter/severe cold (stronger, literary); 炎热 = scorching hot (weather, intense)
凉 is mildly cool/cold (pleasant or neutral); 寒冷 is unpleasantly cold (weather adjective); 严寒 (5k) is literary 'bitter/severe cold'; 冻 (5k) is the physical sensation/action of freezing
搜/搜索 = search by scanning (physical search, internet); 寻找 = look for a specific target; 寻求 = seek/pursue (abstract goals, solutions); 寻觅 = search with longing (literary/emotional)
将 (5k) is the written/formal future marker (将于明年); 将要 is a slightly fuller written form meaning 'is about to / will soon', closer to 快要 in timing.

cedict_en: in a low voice/(speak) in whispers

must_distinguish.note: 小声 is a manner adverb 'in a low voice'; 声音 is 'sound/voice' as a physical phenomenon; 嗓子 is the physical throat/vocal organ; 口气 is the tone or attitude conveyed by speech

cedict_en: child; kid (used to refer to a child, or by an adult to address a child, or, in Taiwan, to refer to sb's own child)

must_distinguish.note: 孩子 = child/kid (neutral everyday); 小朋友 = child/little friend (warm, adult addressing a child); 儿童 = children (formal/official, e.g. 儿童节); 小孩 = kid (colloquial, slightly diminutive)

cedict_en: narrow/office/situation/classifier for games: match, set, round etc/cramped; narrow
dataset_meanings: classifier for games: match, set, round etc

must_distinguish.note: 局 = bureau/office OR a round/game (classifier); 全局 = the overall situation as a whole; 局势 = the (political/strategic) situation at a given moment — all share the 局 root but differ sharply in meaning
房屋 is formal 'building/house'; 屋 is literary/short for room or house; 屋子 is colloquial 'room'; 住房 emphasises residential function/housing as a social concept; 公寓 specifically means apartment building
巧 = coincidentally; also means skillful (dual meaning, context-dependent); 正好 = just right/as it happens (timing/fit without the skillful nuance)
公共汽车 is the standard mainland Chinese term for city bus; 巴士 is a loanword used in Hong Kong/Taiwan and for intercity coaches in the mainland — more informal or regional.

好看 = good-looking (anything: people, objects, scenery); 帅 = handsome/cool (adjective, colloquial praise); 帅哥 = handsome guy (vocative address term, colloquial); 英俊 = handsome (formal adjective, men only)

cedict_en: to spur; to provide impetus; to drive
dataset_meanings: to spur; to provide impetus; to drive

must_distinguish.note: 启动 = start/launch (initiate a process: engine, project, system); 帤动 = drive/spur one thing by means of another (cause-effect, pulling effect)
带动 = to drive/spur (active verb: one thing drives another); 动力 = driving force/impetus (noun: the force or motivation itself)

cedict_en: to have as a feature or characteristic; to have an element of (confidence, sweetness, malevolence etc); to carry (a pathogen, connotation etc)
dataset_meanings: to have as a feature or characteristic; to have an element of (confidence, sweetness, malevolence etc); to carry (a pathogen, connotation etc)

must_distinguish.note: 带有 = carry (a slight quality/tinge — partial, incidental); 有着 = have/possess (literary, emphatic state); 拥有 = own/possess (ongoing state, valuables, rights); 占有 = possess/occupy (with control, sometimes forcibly)
常见 = often encountered (frequency of sighting); 常用 = frequently used in practice; 普通 (5k) = ordinary/unremarkable (neutral quality judgment); 罕见 (5k) = seldom seen (opposite anchor)
常见 = often encountered (frequency of sighting); 常用 = frequently used in practice; 普通 (5k) = ordinary/unremarkable (neutral quality judgment); 罕见 (5k) = seldom seen (opposite anchor)

cedict_en: what are you doing?/what's he up to?

must_distinguish.note: 干什么 asks 'what are you doing?' (action-focused); 干吗 is more colloquial and skews toward 'why? / what for?' (reason-focused), often with impatience.

cedict_en: variant of 幹嘛|干嘛[gan4 ma2]

must_distinguish.note: 干什么 asks 'what are you doing?' (action-focused); 干吗 is more colloquial and skews toward 'why? / what for?' (reason-focused), often with impatience.

cedict_en: see 平安區|平安区[Ping2 an1 Qu1]/safe and sound/well/without mishap/quiet and safe/at peace

must_distinguish.note: 平稳 = stable and even (no fluctuation, physical or abstract steadiness); 顺利 (5k) = going smoothly without obstacles or hitches (process succeeds as hoped)

cedict_en: "house on a cliff" radical in Chinese characters (Kangxi radical 53), occurring in 店, 序, 底 etc/surname Guang/wide/numerous/to spread
dataset_meanings: "house on a cliff" radical in Chinese characters (Kangxi radical 53), occurring in 店, 序, 底 etc

must_distinguish.note: 宽 (5k) = wide in physical dimension (宽两米); 广 = broad/extensive (often figurative or as morpheme); 宽广 = wide and spacious (combined adj., formal); 广阔 (5k) = vast expanse of space or prospects (literary).
库 = warehouse/storehouse (single morpheme; often a suffix in compounds: 图书库, 数据库); 仓库 = warehouse (the standard standalone word)
下边 = below/underneath (neutral spoken); 底下 = directly underneath (physical, colloquial); 下面 = below (also 'the following' in discourse); 以下 = below a threshold or 'hereafter' (formal written)

建成 = complete construction (result, project finished); 建造 = construct/build (physical structure, process); 修建 = build/construct (infrastructure, official tone); 建设 = build and develop (large-scale, incl. society/economy); 建立 = found/establish (an organization, system, or relationship).

建成 = complete construction (result, project finished); 建造 = construct/build (physical structure, process); 修建 = build/construct (infrastructure, official tone); 建设 = build and develop (large-scale, incl. society/economy); 建立 = found/establish (an organization, system, or relationship).

cedict_en: to open a business/to open a practice/open (for business)

must_distinguish.note: 开业 = to open a business for the first time (event, inauguration); 营业 = to be in business/operation (ongoing state, e.g. 营业时间 = business hours)

cedict_en: to draw (e.g. a bow)/to pull/to stretch sth/to extend/to lengthen/to involve or implicate in/to attract/to lead/to guide/to leave/to provide evidence or justification for/old unit of distance equal to 10 丈[zhang4], one-thirtieth of a km or 33.33 meters
dataset_meanings: to provide evidence or justification for
old unit of distance equal to 10 丈, one-thirtieth of a km or 33.33 meters

must_distinguish.note: 拔 = pull out forcefully (stuck objects: teeth, nails, weeds); 抽 = extract with sliding motion (cards, draw liquid, smoke); 引 = pull/attract/lead (abstract or directional, guide); 拉 = pull toward oneself (rope, handle, bow strings)
介绍 = introduce a person, concept, or product to an audience; 引进 = bring in/import from outside (technology, talent, foreign goods).
